name: Glastonbury Garden Club
description: Community garden club organizing plant swaps, workshops, and seasonal garden tours in Glastonbury CT

name: Hartford Botanical Society
description: Educational society promoting botanical knowledge through lectures, field trips, and member gardens in the Hartford region

name: New England Native Plant Society
description: Dedicated to the study, cultivation, and conservation of native plants across New England

name: Friends of Welles-Turner Memorial Library
description: Volunteer organization supporting Glastonbury public library through author talks, book sales, and community programs

name: Hartford Graduate Institute
description: Graduate education and continuing education programs in library science and information management

name: Glastonbury Community Center
description: Town-run community center hosting classes, meetings, and civic events for Glastonbury residents
